data.body:
Gap analysis amendment: Create file at tests/scripts/test-redirect-stubs.sh (not tests/skills/). tests/scripts/ is the only bash-test directory wired into run-all.sh and validate.sh --ci. tests/skills/ has no bash suite runner, so tests/skills/*.sh files are only executed by the pre-commit test-gate, not by the full CI suite. Placing the new file in tests/scripts/ ensures full suite coverage.

.test-index update: append tests/scripts/test-redirect-stubs.sh to the comma-separated list on .test-index line 203 (the long-form design-wireframe/SKILL.md → many tests entry). Do NOT add a new standalone line.
